commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a QA Lab scorecard taxonomy fixture, parser/report builder, coverage-report rendering, and tests for report-only Stable/LTS profile/category validation.

PR surface: Source +763, Tests +290, Other +528. Total +1581 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a QA reporting feature PR rather than a bug report. The reviewed path is the `qa coverage` command through `cli.runtime.ts` and `coverage-report.ts`, with focused proof described in the PR body.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Protected maintainer-labeled PR; the remaining action is maintainer confirmation of taxonomy ownership and proof scope, not automated repair.

target.title: Add QA scorecard taxonomy validation
target.body:
## Summary

- Add an initial report-only Stable/LTS scorecard taxonomy fixture for QA coverage inventory.
- Model scorecard selection with taxonomy-owned profiles only: `smoke-ci` for deterministic PR/merge proof and `release` for Stable/LTS proof.
- Keep advisory external-plugin compatibility as report-only metadata with no runnable profile membership.
- Validate coverage IDs, scenario/docs/code refs, profile/category membership, release-blocking `release` profile coverage, non-advisory rows without profile membership, advisory rows accidentally assigned to profiles, and accidental `--runner multipass` usage.
- Render non-blocking profile/category mapping and validation warnings in `openclaw qa coverage`.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/coverage-report.test.ts`
- `pnpm openclaw qa coverage --output /tmp/openclaw-qa-coverage-scorecard.md`
- `git diff --check`
- `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: QA coverage inventory now emits a scorecard taxonomy section with checked-in profile-owned membership and non-blocking validation warnings.
Real environment tested: local OpenClaw source checkout on branch `dallin/coverage-taxonomy-validation`.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/coverage-report.test.ts`; `pnpm openclaw qa coverage --output /tmp/openclaw-qa-coverage-scorecard.md`; `git diff --check`; `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`.
Evidence after fix: focused Vitest passed 7 tests; coverage report rendered with `Profiles: 2`, `smoke-ci` and `release` profile sections, advisory compatibility as `profiles: none`, and `Validation warnings: 0`; final autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.
Observed result after fix: taxonomy profile terminology matches RFC 0007, `smoke-ci` is deterministic/no-live evidence, `release` is Stable/LTS proof, advisory compatibility is report-only metadata, and `openclaw/multipass` is represented as a channel driver on a host runner.
What was not tested: full changed gate, release CI, live provider lanes, and future harness-neutral profile dispatch are not part of this scoped report-only foundation.
target.author: romneyda
